objectives: Set up and navigate an integrated development environment software for iOS development
Create and run a basic iOS project using Xcode
Apply tools for software configuration management to manage project changes
learning_path.title: iOS Development Setup and Workflow Foundations

objectives: Write core Swift (computer programming) constructs used in iOS apps
Structure small programs to practice data handling and control flow
Prepare Swift code to be used in UI-driven projects
learning_path.title: Swift Programming Essentials for iOS

objectives: Explain the Ios App Lifecycle and how it affects app behavior
Identify where to place code for startup, foreground, and background transitions
Run lifecycle experiments in Xcode to observe state changes
learning_path.title: iOS App Lifecycle and Project Structure

objectives: Create screens and navigation using Ios Sdk (Uikit)
Connect UI elements to Swift (computer programming) logic
Run and debug UI behavior in Xcode
learning_path.title: Building Interfaces with Ios Sdk (Uikit)

objectives: Build views and compose layouts using Swiftui
Bind view state to Swift (computer programming) data structures
Compare Swiftui project flow with Ios App Lifecycle concepts
learning_path.title: Declarative UI with Swiftui

objectives: Define responsibilities of Model, View, and ViewModel in Mvvm Architecture
Refactor UI code to separate presentation logic from views
Apply Mvvm Architecture in either Swiftui or Ios Sdk (Uikit) screens
learning_path.title: Structuring Apps with Mvvm Architecture

objectives: Explain request/response patterns used by Restful Apis
Perform network requests using Urlsession
Handle common networking errors and response validation
learning_path.title: Networking Fundamentals with Restful Apis and Urlsession

objectives: Decode JSON responses into Swift (computer programming) types using Json Parsing (Codable)
Encode Swift (computer programming) types into JSON for requests
Integrate parsing into a Restful Apis workflow
learning_path.title: Json Parsing (Codable) for API Data Models

objectives: Use Concurrency (Async/Await, Gcd) to run network and parsing work without blocking UI
Coordinate multiple asynchronous tasks safely
Integrate Concurrency (Async/Await, Gcd) with Urlsession and Json Parsing (Codable)
learning_path.title: Concurrency for Responsive Apps (Async/Await, Gcd)

objectives: Model and store app data locally using Core Data
Perform basic create, read, update, and delete operations
Connect Core Data to Mvvm Architecture for clean data flow
learning_path.title: Local Persistence with Core Data

objectives: Design a data flow that syncs Restful Apis data into Core Data
Use Json Parsing (Codable) to map API payloads into stored records
Apply Concurrency (Async/Await, Gcd) to keep sync operations responsive
learning_path.title: Offline-First Data Flow: Core Data + Restful Apis

objectives: Relate app components to digital systems concepts (inputs, outputs, state, and transitions)
Apply Ios App Lifecycle understanding to manage state changes predictably
Validate behavior through repeatable runs and debugging in Xcode
learning_path.title: Systems Thinking for iOS Apps: digital systems and Lifecycle Integration

matched_occupation.description: Embedded systems software developers program, implement, document and maintain software to be run on an embedded system.
matched_occupation.label: embedded systems software developer
